category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular IoT device compliance comparison for export from China to Malaysia.

title.en: China-to-Malaysia Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (MCMC / SIRIM)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入马来西亚：MCMC / SIRIM合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入馬來西亞：MCMC / SIRIM合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Malaysian MCMC type approval requirements under the Communications and Multimedia Act 1998, SIRIM EMC and electrical safety testing, Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST) electrical safety approval for listed products, MCMC importer and dealer registration, and CyberSecurity Malaysia advisory cybersecurity guidance.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与马来西亚MCMC型式认可要求（依据1998年《通讯及多媒体法令》）、SIRIM电磁兼容及电气安全检测、Suruhanjaya Tenaga（ST）列明产品电气安全批准、MCMC进口商及经销商注册，以及CyberSecurity Malaysia网络安全咨询指引的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與馬來西亞MCMC型式認可要求（依據1998年《通訊及多媒體法令》）、SIRIM電磁相容及電氣安全測試、Suruhanjaya Tenaga（ST）列明產品電氣安全批准、MCMC進口商及經銷商註冊，以及CyberSecurity Malaysia網路安全諮詢指引的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, MCMC type approval, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current MCMC regulations, SIRIM testing requirements, ST approval obligations, applicable Malaysian Standards, and import-registration requirements with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in Malaysia.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、MCMC型式认可、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于马来西亚销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行MCMC法规、SIRIM检测要求、ST批准义务、适用马来西亚标准及进口商注册要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、MCMC型式認可、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於馬來西亞銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行MCMC法規、SIRIM測試要求、ST批准義務、適用馬來西亞標準及進口商註冊要求。

answer_first.en: The main Malaysia gaps for a China-made Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or IoT wireless device are: (1) mandatory MCMC type approval under the Communications and Multimedia Act 1998, with the MCMC approval number on the product or packaging label before import or sale; (2) EMC testing to MS CISPR-based standards at SIRIM-accredited laboratories; (3) ST electrical safety approval for power adapters and chargers under the Electrical Supply Act 1990; (4) MCMC importer/dealer registration; and (5) no mutual recognition with FCC, CE, or CCC — each Chinese approval document must be re-assessed for Malaysian requirements. CyberSecurity Malaysia advisory guidance is not yet a mandatory certification.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的Wi-Fi、蓝牙或物联网无线设备进入马来西亚的主要差距包括：（1）依据1998年《通讯及多媒体法令》须取得MCMC型式认可，且MCMC批准编号须于进口或销售前标注于产品或包装上；（2）须在SIRIM认可实验室依据基于MS CISPR标准进行EMC检测；（3）电源适配器及充电器须依据1990年《电力供应法令》取得ST电气安全批准；（4）须完成MCMC进口商/经销商注册；（5）与FCC、CE或CCC无相互认可协议，每项中国批准文件均须针对马来西亚要求重新评估。CyberSecurity Malaysia咨询指引目前尚非强制认证。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的Wi-Fi、藍牙或物聯網無線裝置進入馬來西亞的主要差距包括：（1）依據1998年《通訊及多媒體法令》須取得MCMC型式認可，且MCMC批准編號須於進口或銷售前標注於產品或包裝上；（2）須在SIRIM認可實驗室依據基於MS CISPR標準進行EMC測試；（3）電源適配器及充電器須依據1990年《電力供應法令》取得ST電氣安全批准；（4）須完成MCMC進口商/經銷商註冊；（5）與FCC、CE或CCC無相互認可協議，每項中國批准文件均須針對馬來西亞要求重新評估。CyberSecurity Malaysia諮詢指引目前尚非強制認證。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verified flag. human_reviewed requires named reviewer sign-off. Source must be an official Malaysian regulator, MCMC, SIRIM, ST, or primary legal instrument.

q.en: Is MCMC type approval mandatory for all wireless devices imported into Malaysia?
q.zh: 所有进口马来西亚的无线设备是否均须取得MCMC型式认可？
q.zht: 所有進口馬來西亞的無線裝置是否均須取得MCMC型式認可？

a.en: Yes. Under the Communications and Multimedia Act 1998 (CMA 1998), all radio communications and telecom terminal equipment — including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular IoT devices — must obtain MCMC type approval before importation or sale in Malaysia. The MCMC approval number must appear on the product or its packaging. No equivalence is recognised with CE, FCC, or CCC approvals.
a.zh: 是的。依据1998年《通讯及多媒体法令》（CMA 1998），所有无线通信及电信终端设备——包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙及蜂窝物联网设备——均须于在马来西亚进口或销售前取得MCMC型式认可。MCMC批准编号须标注于产品或其包装上。与CE、FCC或CCC批准不存在相互认可关系。
a.zht: 是的。依據1998年《通訊及多媒體法令》（CMA 1998），所有無線通訊及電信終端設備——包括Wi-Fi、藍牙及蜂窩物聯網裝置——均須於在馬來西亞進口或銷售前取得MCMC型式認可。MCMC批准編號須標注於產品或其包裝上。與CE、FCC或CCC批准不存在相互認可關係。

q.en: Does Chinese SRRC radio type approval satisfy MCMC requirements in Malaysia?
q.zh: 中国SRRC无线电型式认可是否满足马来西亚MCMC要求？
q.zht: 中國SRRC無線電型式認可是否滿足馬來西亞MCMC要求？

a.en: No. SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) approval is a domestic Chinese requirement and is not recognised by MCMC. Malaysia has no mutual recognition agreement with China for radio or telecom type approval. A separate MCMC type approval application, with testing by SIRIM-accredited laboratories, is required before the device can be legally imported or sold in Malaysia.
a.zh: 不。SRRC（中国无线电管理机构）批准是中国境内要求，不被MCMC承认。马来西亚与中国之间就无线电或电信型式认可不存在相互认可协议。须另行申请MCMC型式认可，并须在SIRIM认可实验室完成检测，方可在马来西亚合法进口或销售该设备。
a.zht: 不。SRRC（中國無線電管理機構）批准是中國境內要求，不被MCMC承認。馬來西亞與中國之間就無線電或電信型式認可不存在相互認可協議。須另行申請MCMC型式認可，並須在SIRIM認可實驗室完成測試，方可在馬來西亞合法進口或銷售該裝置。
